query: I am gluten-free. Make me a chicken pasta dish.
expected_behavior: Recipe MUST replace regular pasta/flour with a gluten-free option (rice/corn/chickpea pasta, GF flour). allergen_checker must flag wheat.
final_answer:
Here’s a gluten-free chicken pasta dish based on a real source:

Recipe: Dairy & Gluten-free Creamy Lemon Chicken Pasta
Source: https://allergyawesomeness.com/dairy-gluten-free-lemon-chicken-pasta/

Ingredients (2–3 servings)
- 2 chicken breasts, sliced in half
- Olive oil, as needed
- Lemon pepper seasoning, to taste
- 1 cup full-fat canned coconut cream
- 1/4 cup nutritional yeast
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- 1 teaspoon garlic powder
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon pepper
- 6 oz Barilla gluten-free spaghetti (half of a 12 oz box)
- Water, for boiling
- 1 tablespoon salt for pasta water
- 1 tablespoon dried minced garlic
- Optional: cherry tomatoes or chopped fresh parsley

Steps
1. Bring a large stock pot of water to a boil. Add the salt and dried minced garlic.
2. Add the gluten-free spaghetti and boil for about 10 minutes, then drain and set aside.
3. While the pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Thinly slice the chicken breasts, season with lemon pepper seasoning, and cook in the pan until done.
5. Remove the chicken and add the coconut cream, nutritional yeast, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the same pan.
6. Stir until the sauce is heated through and smooth.
7. Add the cooked pasta to the sauce and toss to coat.
8. Top with the chicken and garnish with cherry tomatoes or parsley if desired.

Notes
- This recipe is already gluten-free, so it fits your restriction.
- If you want, I can also adapt it to be dairy-free, higher-protein, or use ingredients you already have.
